title: AWeber vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: AWeber vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between AWeber and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. AWeber is built for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. AWeber wins for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, AWeber or Mailgun?
faq.a: AWeber starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to AWeber?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
